parameters.query:
SELECT * FROM notification_queue
WHERE sent = false
  AND retry_count < 3
  AND (
    priority = 'critical'
    OR (priority = 'high' AND EXTRACT(HOUR FROM NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/London') BETWEEN 7 AND 22)
    OR (priority IN ('medium', 'low') AND EXTRACT(HOUR FROM NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/London') BETWEEN 7 AND 9)
  )
ORDER BY
    CASE priority
        WHEN 'critical' THEN 1
        WHEN 'high' THEN 2
        WHEN 'medium' THEN 3
        WHEN 'low' THEN 4
    END,
    created_at ASC
LIMIT 10;
UPDATE notification_queue SET sent = true, sent_at = NOW() WHERE id = '{{ $('Apply Throttling & Format').item.json.id }}';

INSERT INTO notification_log (notification_type, recipient, jobs_included, status)
VALUES (
    '{{ $('Apply Throttling & Format').item.json.notification_type }}',
    'chellamma.uk@gmail.com',
    1,
    'sent'
);

UPDATE notification_queue SET
    retry_count = retry_count + 1,
    last_error = 'Send failed at {{ new Date().toISOString() }}'
WHERE id = '{{ $('Apply Throttling & Format').item.json.id }}';
